import io
import string

mut line_opt = io.read_line()
while true
  match line_opt
  when None
    line_opt = None
    return
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut idx = -1
    mut i = 0
    while i < n and idx == -1
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 61
          idx = i
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if idx >= 0
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
      let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, n)
      println("#{key}:#{value}")
    end
  end
  line_opt = io.read_line()
end
